objective: Close F-0067 by making successful durable AI scoring finalization atomically rebuild any existing partial exam_report from the same authoritative mock_exam, answer_record and ai_scoring_task facts, increment report_revision and invalidate stale learning suggestions before the completed report becomes immutable.
blockedFiles: all UI files, API routes, provider adapters, credentials, secret/env, deployment and historical evidence/audit files

preRedImpactScan.authoritativeChain: durable ai_scoring_task worker -> ai-scoring-task repository leased completion transaction -> mock_exam and answer_record final facts -> existing exam_report partial snapshot/revision -> exam-report detail/history consumers and direct transaction/service regressions
preRedImpactScan.currentMasterEvidence: A partial report can be rebuilt only by a later explicit generate command. Durable scoring completion updates ai_scoring_task, answer_record and mock_exam but not an already persisted exam_report; detail/history reads return the stale partial snapshot after retry success.

findingDispositionReview.F-0063: not_actionable_on_current_master because the durable task path persists attempt_count/max_attempt_count, atomically claims below max and production no longer consumes the old direct runtime
findingDispositionReview.F-0065: confirmed_but_not_eligible_here because learning-suggestion generation remains blocked by the approved F-0148 quota/Cost Calibration gate and requires a separate future decision

preRedImpactScan.permissionSemantics: unchanged; owner and authorization checks remain in existing report generation/read paths
preRedImpactScan.providerSemantics: unchanged; no Provider call, prompt, model, retry or worker execution behavior is added

examReportFinalizationContract.transaction: if a partial exam_report exists, successful leased task completion must rebuild it before the same database transaction commits; task/log/answer/mock/report failure rolls back together
examReportFinalizationContract.authoritativeFacts: the rebuilt snapshot must be produced by the one canonical report projector from the locked mock_exam, complete answer set and persisted scoring evidence after the current result is applied
examReportFinalizationContract.cardinality: exam report 0/1, answer set and scoring evidence cardinality must be exact; duplicate, missing, mismatched or corrupt facts fail closed
examReportFinalizationContract.revision: a materially changed partial report increments report_revision exactly once, preserves public_id and generated history identity, and becomes completed only when the authoritative mock_exam is completed
examReportFinalizationContract.learningSuggestion: any pre-existing suggestion derived from partial facts is cleared atomically when report scoring facts change; this task does not generate a new suggestion
examReportFinalizationContract.replay: worker response loss or duplicate completion reads the existing terminal task/report without a second report revision; late/stale lease cannot mutate the report
examReportFinalizationContract.absence: if no report exists, scoring completion does not create one; the existing authorized explicit generation path remains authoritative
examReportFinalizationContract.failure: terminal or retryable scoring failure must not falsely finalize a report; partial report behavior remains explicit and recoverable
examReportFinalizationContract.findingDisposition: F-0067 may close statically only after partial-to-completed, multi-task, concurrency, rollback and replay matrices are GREEN; no real database or Provider proof is claimed

validationCommands.name: exam-report-scoring-finalization-state-contract
arguments: strictly parses the F-0067 contract and WIP state

requestedOperations: TDD database application transaction logic without schema or real database execution
